# Vendored Frontend Assets

This course package keeps runtime assets local so the HTML pages work from
GitHub Pages or by opening local files directly.

- KaTeX 0.16.11: formula rendering, including local font files.
- Prism 1.29.0: syntax highlighting for Python, Bash, and JSON, plus line
  numbers.

Do not replace these with CDN links in learner-facing pages unless the course
explicitly switches to an online-only deployment mode.
